name: György Sándor
abstract: György Sándor (Hungarian pronunciation: [ˈɟørɟ ˈʃaːndor]; 21 September 1912 – 9 December 2005) was a Hungarian pianist and writer.

about_quotes.evidence: I remember Benny and John Hammond, people of that group, György Sandor, trying to help Bartok
